title: Ashok
subTitle: A short-tempered man falls in love with a woman who is also pursued by a gangster who wants to marry her. As the man sets out to take on the mighty mob, his estranged family gets drawn into the conflict.

title: Sathydev IPS
subTitle: Sathyadev, an honest police officer, is on a mission to stop an organ trafficking racket, unaware that the mastermind is the same person who killed his beloved.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Tenali Ramakrishna BA.BL
subTitle: A money-driven lawyer takes on cases based on their profitability. However, he has a change of heart when he is assigned a criminal case and decides to fight for justice.

title: Maryadha Ramanna
subTitle: Ramu returns to his hometown to sell a piece of land he owns and falls in love with a young woman only to discover that her parents want him dead.

title: Jack
subTitle: A 10-year-old boy with an aging disease that makes him appear to be 40 is finally allowed to go to school. After entering the fifth grade, he has difficulty making friends.

title: Raja Rani
subTitle: Two people enter an arranged marriage to please their parents, living as strangers under one roof. However, an unforeseen event prompts them to reassess their relationship and emotions.

title: DJ Tillu
subTitle: Bala Gangadhar Tilak, also known as DJ Tillu, is a young man who wishes to become a disc jockey someday. However, his life changes after he falls in love with Radhika.

title: Bharat Ane Nenu
subTitle: Bharat, a graduate from Oxford, is forced to take up his father's position as the chief minister after his sudden death. He tries to reform the corrupt society but faces obstacles from his enemies.

title: Radha Gopalam
subTitle: Gopalam, an assistant public prosecutor, marries Radha, a judge's daughter. However, when Radha becomes a lawyer and proves to be more talented than him, his ego threatens to ruin their relationship.

title: Okkade
subTitle: A minister assigns Yugandhar, an honest police officer, to find a way to stop gang leader Subbarayudu and his followers who are running a parallel government.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Vinaro Bhagyamu Vishnu Katha
subTitle: Vishnu, a helpful person, and Dharshana, a content creator, befriend Murali through the concept of the 'phone number neighbour'. However, things take a mysterious turn afterwards.

title: Happy
subTitle: A misunderstanding leads a strict politician to force his studious daughter into marriage. However, her life takes an unexpected turn when her friend intervenes to help her.

title: Vinaya Vidheya Rama
subTitle: Facing a menacing criminal kingpin, Ram fights to protect his family. Soon, he embarks on a daring mission to topple the villain and dismantle his corrupt empire.

title: Virupaksha
subTitle: While the occurrence of a series of mysterious deaths haunt the villagers, a man decides to risk his life and unravel the secret behind them.

title: Krack
subTitle: When three notorious criminals lock horns with a hot-tempered police officer, Potharaju Shankar, little do they know that they will end up behind bars.

title: The Warrior
subTitle: After enduring a ruthless gangster's cruelty, a former doctor transforms into a police officer and returns to his city on a quest for justice.

title: Rail
subTitle: A train steward develops feelings for a beauty stylist on the New Delhi-Chennai Express. However, their budding romance is cut short when ruthless robbers hijack the train.

title: George Reddy
subTitle: George Reddy, a student leader in Osmania University, decides to revolt against the injustice and economic inequalities in society.

title: Masti Majaa
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.

title: Calvary Darshanam
subTitle: Calvary Darshanam

title: Sathyam Sundaram
subTitle: Arul visits his hometown for a wedding. He meets a relative whose kindness helps him reconnect with forgotten family ties and precious memories.

title: Jalsa
subTitle: Sanjay, a former Naxalite, wishes to marry Indu, but her father rejects their alliance. After the couple parts ways, Sanjay falls for Bhagyamathi, unaware that she is Indu's sister.

title: Veera Simha Reddy
subTitle: Jai Simha Reddy, the son of the esteemed Veera Simha Reddy, returns home to avenge his father's death as a result of village politics.

title: Geethanjali Malli Vachindi
subTitle: Sreenu receives a directorial offer from Vishnu to shoot in a bungalow. Later, he and his crew realise that Vishnu orchestrated the ploy to seek revenge by trapping them in a haunted house.

title: Amaran
subTitle: Major Mukund Varadarajan, a commissioned officer in the Rajput Regiment of the Indian Army, conducts a counterterrorism operation while being deployed to Jammu and Kashmir.

title: Shubham
subTitle: Shubham
